---
title: "Archives"
---

## Links to profile

- <img src="images/orcid_16x16.png" alt="ORCID iD icon" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align: middle;"/> [ORCID: 0000-0002-2217-6977](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2217-6977)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=1xpL6SsAAAAJ&hl=en)
